name: Android Development (Kotlin/Java)
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p /home/vscode/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-10406996_latest.zip -O /tmp/cmdline-tools.zip && unzip -q /tmp/cmdline-tools.zip -d /home/vscode/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && mv /home/vscode/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools /home/vscode/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest && rm /tmp/cmdline-tools.zip && yes | /home/vscode/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager --licenses && /home/vscode/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager "platforms;android-34" "build-tools;34.0.0" "platform-tools"
